metadata.description: Curated extensions for Junie — the AI coding agent by JetBrains

extensions.name: context7
extensions.description: Up-to-date library and framework documentation via Context7 MCP and repository knowledge via DeepWiki MCP.

extensions.name: java-engineer
extensions.description: Java 21 language features, idioms, and coding standards. Covers records, sealed classes, pattern matching, virtual threads, streams, Optional, generics, exception handling, and naming conventions. Pure Java — no framework-specific content.

extensions.name: kotlin-engineer
extensions.description: Complete Kotlin development guide: coroutines, Flow, DSL patterns, idiomatic Kotlin, Ktor server, Android Compose, Kotlin Multiplatform, architecture review, performance, and debugging. Self-contained — works with or without Spring Boot.

extensions.name: redis-engineer
extensions.description: Redis best practices: data structures, key naming, caching patterns, memory management, transactions, pub/sub, clustering, persistence, and observability.

extensions.name: spring-boot-engineer
extensions.description: Complete Spring Boot 3.x guide: REST APIs, Spring Data JPA, Spring Security 6, WebFlux reactive, Kotlin patterns, event-driven architecture, Resilience4j, Spring Cloud, and testing. Single skill covering the full stack.

extensions.name: sql-engineer
extensions.description: SQL and database migrations: Flyway/Liquibase, query optimization, indexing strategies, safe schema changes, and raw SQL best practices.
